title: AutoResearch explained..
summary: Caleb's video explains AutoResearch from Andrej Karpathy as a framework for iterative self-improvement in software development. The video discusses how simulation and iterative improvement can be applied to development workflows, framing it as a unique capability rather than a universal solution.
